title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 525.110 - Execution same as on general judgment
text:
525.110.  Execution same as on general judgment. — When judgment is rendered against any garnishee, the execution shall be such as is allowed by law on general judgment.
(RSMo 1939 § 1570) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1406; 1919 § 1856; 1909 § 2423
